properties.name: Feature: 2E Attack Throw
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Replaces AD&D 2E THACO / to-hit matrices with ACKS II Attack Throw for PCs and NPCs, and presents Armor Class as ACKS ascending (0 = unarmored). Attack throws come from class level or NPC HD. Hit: 1d20 + mods >= throw + AC. Compatible with 2E ADV/DIS.
